## Qaid v0.4.0 — Player data, stats & sharing

The post-rewrite feature backlog, shipped end-to-end: your players and games are now portable, the score history is inspectable and editable after the fact, there's a stats dashboard, richer sharing, an in-app update prompt, and an accessibility pass across every sheet. No breaking changes — the `cardScoreTracker_v1` storage shape is preserved.

### Features

- **Backup & restore** ([5c8d1bf](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/5c8d1bf)) — export your players, recent games, and settings to a JSON file from Home, and import it back (with a confirm) on any device or after a PWA reinstall. Imports run through the same `sanitizeState` validation as a normal load, so a partial or older file restores safely.
- **Smarter player setup** ([5c8d1bf](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/5c8d1bf)) — tap a top player to drop them into the next open seat, re-use a recent line-up in one tap (matched to the mode + player count), and shuffle partners for team formats.
- **Editable finished-game log** ([5c8d1bf](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/5c8d1bf)) — tap any recent game to see its round-by-round breakdown and final standings, then "Edit rounds" to reopen it for corrections using the History screen's existing edit/delete flow. Finished games now store a round snapshot; games logged by older builds show a summary-only view.
- **Stats dashboard** ([5c8d1bf](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/5c8d1bf)) — games played, breakdown by mode, a win-rate leaderboard, current win streaks, and a tappable recent-games list. Reachable from the Home header once you've played a game.
- **Share options** ([5c8d1bf](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/5c8d1bf)) — the Winner screen's share button now opens a sheet: share the result image (in English or Arabic), copy a text summary, or share as text via the native share sheet.
- **In-app update prompt** ([c04c8f8](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/c04c8f8)) — the service worker now installs new builds and *waits*, surfacing a bilingual "new version available" banner with Update / Later instead of silently swapping mid-session.

### Accessibility

- **Focus trapping across all sheets** ([5c8d1bf](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/5c8d1bf)) — a reusable `useFocusTrap` keeps keyboard focus inside the Confirm, Profile, Round, Recent-game, and Share sheets while open and restores it on close. Toasts are now polite ARIA live regions.

### Polish (carried over since v0.3.0)

- **Sebeeta numpad layout** ([5934f71](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/5934f71)) — CLR and the `−10` shortcut swap to thumb-reachable corners, and the action key splits into Prev / Next.
- **Test coverage** ([9a1b075](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/9a1b075)) — long-tail UI coverage gaps closed.

### State shape

No breaking changes. The `cardScoreTracker_v1` localStorage key and shape are preserved. `RecentGame` gained **optional** snapshot fields (`scores`, `playerTeam`, `threshold`, `winRule`, `koutEntryMode`) and a new `'stats'` screen value was added — both accepted by `sanitizeState`, so older saves load unchanged and pre-snapshot recent entries degrade gracefully.

### Test suite

| Layer | Coverage |
|---|---|
| Engine + pure helpers | `scoring`, `profiles`, `gameLog`, `persistedState`, `backup`, `stats`, `shuffle` |
| State machine | `GameContext` (forward/reverse log, `replaceState`, `reopenRecentGame`) |
| Screens | Setup, Play, Winner, History, Home, Stats |
| Components | Confirm / Round / Recent-game / Update prompt / Quick-fill sheets, share text |
| **Total** | **188** passing across 25 files |

### Verification

- `npm run typecheck` clean
- `npm test` 188/188 passing
- `npm run build` succeeds — prompt-mode service worker, 17-entry Workbox precache
- All six features exercised in a live preview (light + dark, no console errors)
